dateline: Goyang, South Korea — 'Come Over' Debuts Live; Three-Night Goyang Run Completes
heroHeadline: BTS Closes Goyang with 'Come Over' Live Debut — ARIRANG Tour Moves to Tokyo Dome
heroSubtitle: 4,686 days since debut: BTS closed the three-night Goyang Stadium opening run on April 12, 2026 — performing 'Come Over' live for the first time. ARIRANG holds #1 on Billboard 200 for two consecutive weeks (tracking toward a 3rd), global cinema viewings in 75+ countries, and HYBE signs a $100M+ global distribution deal with KWM. World Tour continues to Tokyo Dome next.
footerNote: Data sourced from HYBE, Billboard, Hanteo Chart, Gaon Chart, Melon, Spotify, Netflix, Guinness World Records, IFPI, Korea Times, Yonhap, and Recording Academy.
